About Me

Discover my background, experience, and the core philosophy that drives my design process.

124 Completed
Project
65 Happy
Clients
18 Awards
Won

Hello! I'm Suraj, a versatile Graphic Designer, UI/UX expert, and Video Editor currently based in Chiang Mai, Thailand. With over a decade of hands-on experience in the creative and tech industries, I specialize in transforming complex problems into elegant, user-centric visual solutions.

My journey began in web development and full-stack solutions, collaborating with clients across Japan and Myanmar. Over the years, I've evolved into a multidisciplinary designer, mastering everything from brand identity and responsive UI/UX to high-quality video editing. This technical background gives me a unique edge—I don't just design interfaces that look beautiful; I design realistic, scalable experiences that developers can seamlessly bring to life.

Today, I focus heavily on integrating modern workflows, leveraging advanced AI tools alongside industry standards like Figma, DaVinci Resolve, and the Adobe Creative Suite. Whether I'm crafting a brand's visual identity from scratch, prototyping a web application, or editing compelling video content, my goal remains the same: to deliver impactful, pixel-perfect results that help businesses thrive.
